name: D+Q bone RCT 20-week P1NP synthesis compatibility
question: Can the 20-week P1NP result from the D+Q postmenopausal bone RCT be pooled for a meta-analysis estimate?

compatibility_basis.population: Postmenopausal women in the D+Q and untreated-control arms of one phase 2 randomized trial.
compatibility_basis.effect_metric: Between-group P1NP percent-change effect with uncertainty.
compatibility_basis.variance_model: No pooling model selected because only one 20-week P1NP result is available and the effect record is p-value-only.

pooling_rationale: Pooling is blocked by result count and missing effect extraction. This endpoint-specific group has one 20-week P1NP result from one trial, and the posted record provides arm medians, full ranges, and a p-value rather than a between-group effect value with uncertainty.
non_pooling_reason: Do not pool the 20-week P1NP endpoint until at least two compatible 20-week P1NP results are available and all included results carry effect value, uncertainty, comparison, sample-size, and group-value fields.

missing_effect_fields_by_result.note: The 20-week P1NP result is p-value-only with group medians and full ranges; it lacks a between-group effect value and variance-compatible uncertainty.

self_healing_actions: Keep this endpoint group separate from short-term P1NP signals because the 20-week time horizon and direction differ.
Route p-value-only 20-week P1NP extraction to extraction_refresh if source tables provide an effect estimate with uncertainty.

provenance.note: Posted 20-week P1NP group values and D+Q versus untreated-control p-value.

provenance.locator: PubMed abstract P1NP secondary endpoint sentence
provenance.note: Abstract reports P1NP was not different from untreated control at 20 weeks.
